description: real_estate_rental mini-suite — 12 fixtures curated from RCTW-171 by REAL_ESTATE regex match (compatible with IntentVerifier.kt:73). All fixtures have at least one REAL_ESTATE token (户型/平米/房源/急售/吉房/二手房) so Pass 7's !REAL_ESTATE guard does NOT misfire to phone. (rebuilt with 'scenes' key per EvalRunner.kt:92 contract). [2026-07-14] image_572 removed: dominant signal is police-emergency, not real_estate. 11 fixtures remain, all matching REAL_ESTATE regex.
